text:
is a collection of games for the , released on 08 October 2009 by CyberFront. 

Overview

It is a collection of the following PSP games: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden, Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd PORTABLE and Secret of Evangelion PORTABLE (Best Hit). It comes within a box with additional itens like a Neon Genesis Evangelion Portable Pack book, a cloth made holder and a metalic item.
